name: default-policy
description: Default STRATIX policy configuration for agent guardrails. Defines safety boundaries, content filters, and operational limits for production agents.

rules.name: high_value_transfer_limit
rules.description: Block automated financial transactions above the threshold and require manual review

rules.name: pii_output_filter
rules.description: Prevent agent from including PII in responses
rules.fallback_message: I cannot share that personal information. Please contact our support team directly for account-specific details.

rules.name: content_safety_filter
rules.description: Filter harmful, toxic, or inappropriate content in agent responses
rules.fallback_message: I'm unable to assist with that request. Is there something else I can help you with?

rules.name: topic_boundary
rules.description: Keep agent responses within the defined scope of the service
rules.fallback_message: That falls outside my area of expertise. I'd recommend consulting a qualified professional for that question.

rules.name: conversation_rate_limit
rules.description: Limit the number of agent turns per session to prevent abuse
rules.fallback_message: We've reached the conversation limit for this session. Please start a new session or contact support for extended assistance.

rules.name: action_authorization
rules.description: Require explicit user confirmation before executing destructive or irreversible actions
rules.confirmation_prompt: I want to confirm: you'd like me to proceed with {action}. This action {reversibility}. Please confirm with 'yes' to proceed.
